# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: web-application
description: A Helm chart for our web application
version: 0.1.0

# Include your dependencies here if any

values:
  replicaCount: 1

  image:
    repository: my-web-app
    tag: latest
    pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

  service:
    enabled: true
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 80

  ingress:
    enabled: false
    name: ""
    path: /
    hosts:
      - host: chart-example.local
        paths: []
    annotations: {}

  resources: {}
  
  database:
    username: admin
    password: DefaultPass123

  # Additional settings can be added here

# templates/deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "web-application.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "web-application.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "web-application.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "web-application.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web-application
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          env:
            - name: DB_USERNAME
              value: {{ .Values.database.username | quote }}
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              value: {{ .Values.database.password | quote }}
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }}

# templates/service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "web-application.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "web-application.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: 80
  selector:
    {{- include "web-application.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}

# templates/ingress.yaml (if ingress is enabled)
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ include "web-application.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "web-application.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    {{- toYaml .Values.ingress.annotations | nindent 4 | trim | indent 4 }}
spec:
  rules:
    - host: {{ .Values.ingress.hosts[0].host }}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: {{ .Values.ingress.path }}
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{ include "web-application.fullname" . }}
                port:
                  number: {{ .Values.service.port }}
